definition_cn: 画“乙”字形状的记号，从前读书写字时常常用到，例如读书读到一个地方暂时停止，在上面画个“∠”形的记号，或是写字有颠倒、遗漏，用曲折的线勾过来或把补写的字勾进去，都叫做“乙”。古书没有标点，到一段终了而下无空格时，有时也画个“∠”形记号，表示第二行起是另一段。
definition_en: draw a mark like ‘乙’oft. when reading or writing. For example, when you pause after reading to a certain place, you mark with a ‘∠’at the place; when two Chinese characters are printed in wrong order or there is a word missing, transpose the two characters or insert the missing word with the same mark of ‘乙’. As no punctuation marks were used in ancient books, when you come to the end of a paragraph with no space left on the line, a ‘∠’, mark was used to indicate the next line as a new paragraph.

definition_cn: 泸水,就是今金沙江在四川宜宾以上、云南四川交界处的一段。
definition_en: Lushui River, a section of the Jinsha River between Yibin in Sichuan and the area bordering Yunnan and Sichuan provinces
Lushui River, Nujiang River of today
fix one's eyes on; gaze at; stare at

definition_cn: 从孔穴里发出的声音,泛指声音
definition_en: sound emitting from a hole; (in a broad sense) sound; noise

definition_cn: 鸟,形状像鸡,雄的尾巴长,羽毛很美丽,多为赤铜色或深绿色,有光泽,雌的尾巴稍短,灰褐色。善走,不能久飞。尾部羽毛可做装饰品。
definition_en: pheasant; gallinaceous bird of the family Phasianidae, the male having a long tail and brilliantly coloured glossy plumage, oft. copper red or dark green and used for ornamental purposes, while the female has a short tail and is greyish brown. They are capable of walking long distances but unable to fly for a long time;

definition_cn: 城墙长三丈高一丈叫一雉。
definition_en: parapet section of an ancient city wall, 30 chi high and 10 chi long (1 chi equal to 1/3 metre)

definition_cn: 封闭(常用在信封上寄信人姓名后
definition_en: oft. used after the sender's family name on the envelope

definition_cn: [婀娜](ēnuó,旧读formerly pronounceděnuǒ)(姿态)柔软而美好
definition_en: (of posture) lithe and graceful; supple and elegant
Zhashui, name of a place in Shaanxi Province

definition_cn: [蟑螂](zhāngláng)昆虫,体扁平,黑褐色, 能发出臭味。常咬坏衣物, 并能传染伤寒、霍乱等疾病,是害虫。
definition_en: cockroach; roach; harmful insect of the order Dictyoptera, with a flat, dark brown body giving forth an offensive odour, eating clothes, and spreading diseases such as typhoid fever and cholera;

definition_cn: 金属元素,符号Sb(stibium)。普通锑银白色,质硬而脆,有冷胀性。无定形锑灰色,由卤化锑电解制得。用于工业和医药上,超纯锑是重要的半导体和红外探测器材料。
definition_en: stibium(Sb); antimony; silvery-white, brittle, metallic element of crystalline structure with cold expansion. Amorphous antimony is obtained through the electrolysis of halogenated antimony. Used in industry and medicine, super-pure antimony is an important material for making semiconductors and infrared detectors.

definition_cn: 把东西放在石臼或乳钵里捣去皮壳或捣碎
definition_en: husk or pound with mortar and pestle

definition_cn: 田地中间南北方向的小路
炊事用具,相当于现在的锅
〈中医Chin. med.〉指身体某一部分萎缩或失去机能的病,例如下痿、阳痿等。
definition_en: illness caused by decline or loss of function of a certain body part, such as paraplegia or erectile disfunction

definition_cn: 病,某一脏器通过周围组织较薄弱的地方而隆起。头、膈、腹股沟等部都能发生这种病。
definition_en: hernia; protrusion of an organ through surrounding tissues or a wall of the cavity, a disease that may occur in the head, the midriff and the groin

definition_cn: [嘧啶](mìdìng)有机化合物,化学式C?H?N?。无色液体或结晶物质,有刺激性气味。用来制化学药品。
definition_en: pyrimidine (C?H?N?), organic chemical compound in the form of a colourless liquid or crystal with an irritant odour, used in making chemicals
fall into oblivion; bury in oblivion

definition_cn: 金属元素，符号Ta。银白色，有超导电性（-268.8℃时）和延展性，耐腐蚀性强。用来制造化学器皿、真空管、医疗器械等。
definition_en: tantalum (Ta); silver-white metallic element with superconductivity (at-268.8℃), ductibility and high resistance to erosion, used as a material for the making of chemical apparatuses, vacuum tubes and medical equipment

definition_cn: 蜂、蝎子等用毒刺刺人或动物。
definition_en: (of bees, scorpions, etc.) sting; prick with a sting

definition_cn: 某些物质刺激皮肤或黏膜使发生微痛
皮肤病,病原体是一种病毒,症状是皮肤上出现跟正常的皮肤颜色相同的或黄褐色的突起,表面干燥而粗糙,不疼不痒,多长在面部、头部或手背等处。
definition_en: wart; skin disease caused by a virus, characterized by a protuberance on the skin, of the normal skin colour or yellowish-brown, with a dry and rough surface, neither painful nor itchy, usu. growing on the face, head or the back of the hand;
(of a matter or business) be settled; be well done; do a good job

definition_cn: 由霉菌引起的某些皮肤病的统称,如发癣、脚癣、手癣等。
definition_en: tinea; ringworm; general term for skin diseases caused by mildew, e.g. hair tinea, athlete's foot, tinea manus, etc.
a kind of monkey as described in ancient books
branched river; branch of a river

definition_cn: 气体元素,符号Ar(argonium)。无色无臭无味,是大气中含量最多的稀有气体,化学性质很不活泼。放电时发出蓝色的光,在电弧焊接不锈钢、镁、铝等时用作保护气体,也用来填充灯管和灯泡。
definition_en: argon (Ar); colourless, odourless, inert gaseous element and the most abundant rare gas in the earth's atmosphere, emitting blue light when discharging electricity, used as an inert gas shield in arc welding of stainless steel, magnesium, aluminium, etc., and also for use in electric light bulbs, fluorescent tubes
time when the sun is about to rise

definition_cn: 传说把许多毒虫放在器皿里使互相吞食,最后剩下不死的毒虫叫蛊,用来放在食物里害人。
definition_en: gu; legendary venomous insect. Legend has it that if many venomous insects were put in a container, they would eat one another. The final survivor was called gu, which could be used to make food poisonous.

definition_cn: 用粉末、油类等涂(在脸上或手上等)
definition_en: put powder, ointment, etc., on (face or hands, etc.); apply

definition_cn: 有机化合物的一类,是烃基和氰基的碳原子连接而成的化合物。
definition_en: nitrile; organic compound resulting from connection of carbon atoms in hydrocarbon radical and cyanide group

definition_cn: 皇宫大门前两边供瞭望的楼,泛指帝王的住所
definition_en: watchtower on either side of a palace gate; (gen.) imperial palace

definition_cn: 神庙、陵墓前竖立的石雕。
definition_en: stone carving erected in front of a temple or tomb;

definition_cn: 古人席地而坐时铺的席。泛指筵席
definition_en: mat spread on the floor for people to sit in ancient times; (in a broad sense) feast or banquet
[indicating disdain, annoyance or disapproval] pah; bah; pooh
highland barley; qingke barley (a farm crop of Tibet and Qinghai)

definition_en: carbuncle; painful purulent inflammation of the skin and subcutaneous tissues, caused by staphylococcus bacteria, oft. attacking the back or neck, with symptoms of local red swellings, nodules with many pustules on the surface, and sometimes multiple sieve-shaped openings for the discharge of pus, prone to cause fever, chills, etc., or to be complicated by blood poisoning when serious

definition_cn: 苍蝇的幼虫,体柔软,有环节,白色,前端尖,尾端钝,或有长尾。多生在粪便、动物尸体和不洁净的地方。
definition_en: maggot; larva of a fly; white, soft-bodied annelid with a pointed front and blunt rear or a long tail, oft. found in excrement, decaying dead animals or unclean places

definition_cn: 〈方dial.〉两山之间可通行的狭窄地方;山口。多用于地名,如马头垭、荀家垭(都在湖北)。
definition_en: moutain pass; strip of land that provides passage between two mountains, mostly used in place names, such as Matouya and Xunjiaya in Hubei Province
wooden tablets or slips for writing (in ancient times)

definition_cn: 一年生草本植物,茎略带红色,叶互生,三角状心脏形,有长柄,总状花序,花白色或淡粉红色,瘦果三角形,有棱,子实磨成粉供食用。
definition_en: buckwheat (Fagopyrum esculentum); annual herb with a slightly red stem, triangular heart-shaped and long-stemmed alternate leaves, raceme, white or light pink flowers, triangular edged achenes, and seeds that are edible when ground into flour

definition_cn: 往;向(表示在某一方向上的延伸)

cut meat or fish into thin pieces

definition_cn: 涪江,发源于四川,流至重庆入嘉陵江。
definition_en: Fujiang River in Sichuan Province, which joins the Jialing River in Chongqing
one kind of bitter edible plant as described in ancient books
white flower of reeds as described in ancient books

definition_cn: 古书上指光芒四射的彗星。
definition_en: (as recorded in ancient books) comet shedding its rays in all directions
Chuzhou, place name in Anhui Province
bring gift to or send best wishes to

definition_en: semi-circular pool within the precincts of a former provincial college; chief college of an ancient state. During the Qing Dynasty, passing the imperial exam at the county level is known as ‘enrolling in the provincial college’.
put a body into a coffin; encoffin

definition_en: Chinese wolfberry (Lycium chinense); deciduous shrub with pale purple flowers and red round or ellipse berries; used as a Chinese tonic
official document or note; credentials; certificate

definition_cn: 〈拟声词onom.〉撞击金属器物的声音。

definition_en: pan; pot with a level bottom used to bake unleavened pancake

definition_cn: 古书上指芦苇一类的植物。
鱼类的一科,身体大,略呈纺锤形,鳞细而圆,是重要的食用鱼类。常见的有大麻哈鱼。

definition_cn: 田里或浅水里用来挡水的土埂

dry or cool sth. by wind

definition_en: file; grater; linear, multiple-edged hand tool mainly used to lightly polish the surface of metal, wood and leather, classified into flat, round, square and triangular files based on their different cross-sections;
file; make smooth with a file
blade of a sword or knife
hack; cut; chop (with a sword or axe)

definition_cn: 垓下(Gāixià),古地名,在今安徽灵璧东南。项羽在这里被围失败。

definition_en: scull; sweep; tool for propelling a boat, larger and longer than an oar, placed over the stern or by the side, operated manually

definition_cn: 空气中因悬浮着大量的烟、尘等微粒而形成的混浊现象。
definition_en: haze; obscuration of the sky by a wide dispersion of smoke or dust particles in the air;
mate; copulate; have sex; have a sexual intercourse

definition_cn: [蹶子](juě zi)骡马等用后腿向后踢叫尥(liào)蹶子。
definition_en: (of mules, horses, etc.) kick out hind leg

definition_cn: 壮大。用于人名,如唐代和尚玄奘。

rude; crude in manner; surly; boorish in manner and speech

横膈膜痉挛,吸气后声门突然关闭而发出的一种特殊声音。

[used in place names] Wanding (in Yunnan Province)

definition_cn: 打击乐器,形状像曲尺,用玉或石制成。
definition_en: qing, ancient trisquare-shaped percussion instrument made of jade or stone

definition_cn: 佛教的打击乐器,形状像钵,用铜制成。
definition_en: Buddhist percussion instrument shaped like an alms bowl and made of bronze

definition_cn: 〈拟声词onom.〉形容撞击震动的声音
definition_en: crash; bang; sound of a crash or vibration
with abandonment; freedom from restraint; indulgent

measurement of length, equal to eight cun (寸)
put blame on sb. else; shirk

spread manure; apply fertilizer to the fields
deep sorrow; grief; agony; wail; cry out loud

definition_cn: 水桶,多用竹子或木头制成。
definition_en: pail (usu. made of bamboo strips or wood); bucket

definition_cn: 小腿与脚之间部位的左右两侧的突起,是由胫骨和腓骨下端的膨大部分形成的。

definition_cn: 古代一种旗杆顶上用彩色羽毛做装饰的旗子。
definition_en: feather-decked banner hoisted on a mast in ancient times

definition_cn: 鸟类的一属,头小,颈长,背部平,尾巴短,不善于飞,能涉水。大鸨就属于这一属。
definition_en: bustard; any bird of the family Otididae featuring small head, long neck, flat back, and short tail, not good at flying but capable of wading across waters. Great bustard belongs to this family.

definition_cn: 氢的同位素之一，符号D或H。原子核中有一个质子和一个中子，普通的氢中含有0.02%的氘。用于热核反应。
definition_en: deuterium (D or H), one of the isotopes of hydrogen whose atomic nucleus consists of one proton and one neutron. Naturally occurring hydrogen contains 0.02% deuterium, which is used for thermonuclear reaction.

definition_cn: 锟铻(Kūnwú),古书上记载的山名。所产的铁可以铸刀剑,因此锟铻也指宝剑。
definition_en: Kunwu, name of a mountain recorded in ancient books, said to be rich in iron suitable for casting swords, thus 锟铻became the synonym for sword

definition_cn: 伤口或疮口表面上由血小板和纤维蛋白凝结而成的块状物,伤口或疮口痊愈后自行脱落。
definition_en: scab; crust of congealed platelet and fibrin that forms over a sore or wound during healing, and falls off when it heals

definition_cn: 金属元素,符号Cd(cadmium)。银白色,质软,延展性强。用来制合金、光电管和核反应堆的中子吸收棒等,也用于电镀。
definition_en: cadmium (Cd); white, ductile and divalent metallic element, for use in the making of certain alloys, phototubes and the neutron-absorbing sticks for nuclear reactors, and also in electroplating

definition_cn: 皮肤上生的青色、红色或黑褐色的斑痕或小疙瘩。多由先天性血管瘤或淋巴管瘤引起,也有由皮肤色素沉着引起的,不痛不痒。
definition_en: naevus; mole; lentigo; beauty spot; blue, red or blackish brown spot or small protuberance on the skin, oft. caused by congenital haemangioma or lymphangioma, occasionally by skin pigmentation, having no symptoms like pain or itching

definition_cn: 像糨糊或胶水等所具有的、能使一个物体附着在另一物体上的性质

definition_en: gui, last of the 10 Heavenly Stems

definition_cn: 腰的两侧和大腿之间的部分
definition_en: hip; laterally projecting region of each side of the lower or posterior part of the mammalian trunk, formed by the lateral parts of the pelvis and upper part of the femur, together with the fleshy parts covering them

definition_en: sturgeon; fish of the family Acipenseridae with a yellowish grey back, a small and pointed mouth, and large hard scales on the back and belly, living in fresh water and sometimes swimming to the sea for the winter
much; many; numerous; a great deal
walk to and fro; turn back halfway
length; length from north to south

definition_cn: 机器上能滚动的圆柱形机件的统称。
definition_en: roller; general term for any cylindrical machine part that rolls or rotates;

definition_cn: 舂米用具,用柱子架起一根木杠,杠的一端装一块圆形的石头,用脚连续踏另一端,石头就连续起落,去掉下面石臼中的糙米的皮。简单的碓只是一个石臼,用杵捣米。
definition_en: old-style rice huller consisting of a treadle-operated tilt hammer and a mortar, or simply a mortar only

The larvae live in the soil, marshy land and paddy fields.

definition_cn: 含玉的石头,也指没有琢磨的玉。
definition_en: stone containing jade, or uncut jade
angry; irritated; infuriated; annoyed; indignant; furious

definition_cn: [菖蒲](chāngpú)多年生草本植物,生在水边,地下有淡红色根茎,叶子形状像剑,肉穗花序。根茎可做香料,也可入药。
definition_en: calamus (Acorus calamus); sweet flag; perennial herb growing in marshy places and having sword-like leaves, flowers borne on a spadix, and pink rhizomes used in perfumery and medicine

definition_cn: 〈拟声词onom.〉形容撞击振动的声音

definition_en: sandpiper; snipe; migratory bird of the family Scolopacidae, having grey feathers, a long thin bill, long legs, and feet that are not webbed, feeding on small fish, shells, insects, etc. on shores or in paddy fields
clear up after rain or snow
silk ribbon attached to an official seal or a medal

definition_cn: 哺乳动物,毛黑褐色,嘴尖,眼小。前肢发达,脚掌向外翻,有利爪,适于掘土,后肢细小。白天住在土中,夜晚出来捕食昆虫,也吃农作物的根。
definition_en: mole (Talpa europaea); small burrowing insectivorous mammal of the family Talpidae, usu. living underground during the daytime and coming out to feed on insects and the roots of farm crops at night, having dark brown fur, pointed muzzle, small rudimentary eyes, and strong forefeet with soles turned outward for burrowing;

definition_cn: 表示一个数自乘若干次的形式叫幂。如t自乘n次的幂为t。

upper case of the Chinese character for the numeral two

definition_cn: 一年生草本植物,叶子披针形,花淡绿色或淡红色,果实卵形,扁平。茎叶有辣味。全草入药。
definition_en: knotweed (Polygonum); annual herb with lanceolar leaves, light green or red flowers, and flat oval fruits, stems and leaves having a peppery-taste, and the whole plant being useful as medicine;

definition_cn: 中国古代民族,是匈奴的一个别支,居住在今山西省东南部,东晋时曾在黄河流域建立过后赵国(公元311—334)。
definition_en: Jie people; a branch of the Huns (Xiongnus) living in the southeast of present-day Shanxi Province, who founded the State of Later Zhao (311-334) in the Yellow River Valley during the Eastern Jin Dynasty
(of smoke or mist) dense; thick; enshrouding
loosen the bowels and bladder; excrement or urine
meet by chance; run into (a close relative or friend)
present oneself before (a monarch); go to court; have an audience with

definition_cn: 多年生草本植物,叶子分裂成丝状,花黄色。茎叶供食用,果实长椭圆形,可以做调味香料。果实榨的油叫茴香油,供药用。
definition_en: fennel (Foeniculum vulgare); perennial plant with fine linear leaves and yellow flowers. The stem and leaf are edible and the oval-shaped fruit is aromatic and used in cooking. Fennel oil, extracted from the fruit, is used in medicine.
Huangpi, name of a place in Hubei Province

definition_cn: 用金片做成的花朵形的装饰品,或木器上和漆器上用螺壳镶嵌的花纹
definition_en: flower-patterned ornament made of gold foil; shell-inlaid flower pattern on wooden or lacquer-ware

definition_cn: 割肉离骨,指封建时代的凌迟刑
definition_en: cut to pieces; dismember a body (a form of capital punishment in feudal times)
fabricate (a story, etc.); make up; cook up; invent
one (used as the numeral 一 yī on cheques, banknotes, etc. to avoid mistakes or alterations)

definition_cn: [菟丝子](tùsīzǐ)一年生草本植物,茎很细,呈丝状,黄白色,茎上有吸取别的植物体养料的器官,叶子退化,开白色小花。多寄生在豆科植物上。种子黄褐色,可入药。
definition_en: Chinese dodder (Cuscuta chinensis); yellow-white annual parasitic vine with retrograde leaves, small white flowers, and a stem grown with organs for obtaining nutrition from other plants, oft. living off legumes, its yellowish brown seeds used as medicine;

definition_cn: 古书上指用以调味的香草。
definition_en: fragrant herb used as condiment as mentioned in ancient books

definition_cn: 唐代定制,官吏十天一次休息沐浴,每月分为上浣、中浣、下浣,后来借作上旬、中旬、下旬的别称。

moo; low; bellow; sound made by an ox
Pizhou, name of a place in Jiangsu Province

definition_cn: 打击乐器,是两个圆铜片,中间突起成半球形,正中有孔,可以穿绸条或布片,两片合起来拍打发声。

Qionglai, name of a mountain in Sichuan Province

definition_cn: [妯娌](zhóu lǐ)哥哥的妻子和弟弟的妻子的合称
皇帝车驾上有銮铃,借指皇帝的车驾

definition_en: same as 熏 xūn, used only in the phrase 窨茶叶 xūn cháyè, meaning putting jasmine flowers into tea leaves for fragrance.

definition_cn: 鱼,形状跟鳊鱼相似而较宽,银灰色,胸部略平,腹部中央隆起。生活在淡水中。

definition_cn: 金属元素,符号Nb(niobium)。灰白色,质硬,有超导性,用来制耐高温合金、电子管等。

definition_cn: 在别人面前说某人的坏话

definition_en: raccoon-dog (Nyctereutes procyonoides); carnivorous mammal with brownish-grey hair, small short ears, and long hairs on its cheeks, living in woods, hiding by day and coming out at night, eating fish, shrimp and small animals such as rats and rabbits; an important animal for its fur;

definition_cn: 义同‘貉’(hé),专用于‘貉绒、貉子’。
definition_en: same as 貉 hé, used in 貉绒 háoróng and 貉子 háo zi

definition_cn: 迷信的人指将来要应验的预言、预兆

Ye, place name in ancient times, in present-day Linzhang, Hebei Province.

definition_cn: 滹沱河(Hūtuó Hé),水名,在河北,与滏阳河会合后叫子牙河。

carry sth. heavy on one's shoulder

definition_cn: 气体元素,符号Xe(xenonum)。无色,无臭,无味,大气中含量极少,化学性质不活泼。具有极高的发光强度,用来填充光电管、闪光灯等。

die or be put to death by hanging

definition_cn: 译音用字,如吖嗪、哒嗪、哌嗪。

definition_cn: 马嚼子的两端露出嘴外的部分

古代兵器,青铜或铁制成,形状像板斧而较大。

weak and weary through illness; run-down

columns (or pillars) at the front of the main hall of a building

Adults have a small brown or black body with long, fine feelers and short, wide wings while the larvae have a long, round, greyish white or yellowish white body and smooth skin. The pupae are oval brown, the eggs spindle-shaped, and yellowish white. Certain female midges suck the blood of human beings or animals; can spread disease.
Shanshan (Pigan), name of a place in Xinjiang

team of four horses drawing a chariot

front and back of a Chinese gown
two pieces of jade fitted together

wan, unit of land measurement equivalent to 30 mu

ugly; unpleasant to the eye; plain-looking
short for Putian, a city in Fujian Province

definition_cn: 臣杀死君主或子女杀死父母

definition_en: Guo, a state in the Zhou Dynasty. The State of West Guo was east of present-day Baoji, Shaanxi Province before it was moved to the southeast of Shanxian County, Henan Province, while the State of East Guo was located to the northwest of present-day Zhengzhou, Henan Province.

mao; 18th of the 28 constellations in ancient Chinese astronomy
